testcase.name: example_tm_a_mmrm.Rd
testcase.system-out: values(selected = "FKSI-FWB") - Setting explicit `selected` while `choices` are delayed (set using `tidyselect`) doesn't guarantee that `selected` is a subset of `choices`. Backtrace: x 1. +-teal.modules.clinical (local) with_mocked_app_bindings(...) at test-examples.R:124:5 2. | +-testthat::with_mocked_bindings(...) at test-examples.R:106:3 3. | \-testthat::with_mocked_bindings(...) at test-examples.R:106:3 4. +-teal.modules.clinical (local) suppress_warnings(...) at test-examples.R:106:3 5. | \-base::withCallingHandlers(...) at test-examples.R:20:3 6. +-testthat::expect_no_error(...) 7. | \-testthat:::expect_no_(...) 8. | \-testthat:::quasi_capture(enquo(object), NULL, capture) 9. | +-testthat (local) .capture(...) 10. | | +-base::withRestarts(...) 11. | | | \-base (local) withOneRestart(expr, restarts[[1L]]) 12. | | | \-base (local) doWithOneRestart(return(expr), restart) 13. | | \-base::withCallingHandlers(...) 14. | \-rlang::eval_bare(quo_get_expr(.quo), quo_get_env(.quo)) 15. \-pkgload::run_example(...) 16. \-base::source(tmp, echo = !quiet, local = env, max.deparse.length = Inf) 17. +-base::withVisible(eval(ei, envir)) 18. \-base::eval(ei, envir) 19. \-base::eval(ei, envir) 20. +-teal::init(...) 21. | +-checkmate::assert(...) 22. | | \-base::eval(dots[[i]], envir = env) 23. | | \-base::eval(dots[[i]], envir = env) 24. | \-checkmate::check_multi_class(modules, c("teal_modules", "teal_module")) 25. +-teal::modules(...) 26. +-teal.modules.clinical::tm_a_mmrm(...) 27. +-teal.modules.clinical:::tm_a_mmrm.default(...) 28. | \-checkmate::assert_class(paramcd_values, "values") 29. | \-checkmate::checkClass(x, classes, ordered, null.ok) 30. \-teal.picks::values(selected = "FKSI-FWB") 31. \-teal.picks:::.pick(...)

testcase.name: e2e_teal_picks_playground_get_teal_picks_slot_reads_datasets_variables.

error.message: Error in `chromote_wait_for_condition(self$get_chromote_session(), script, timeout = timeout, interval = interval)`: Timed out waiting for JavaScript script to return `true` ('test-shinytest2-teal_picks_playground.R:80:3')

testcase.error: Error in `chromote_wait_for_condition(self$get_chromote_session(), script, timeout = timeout, interval = interval)`: Timed out waiting for JavaScript script to return `true` i `timeout`: 30000 i `script`: document.getElementById("teal-teal_modules-nav-teal_picks_playground-module-paramcd-datasets-selected") !== null Backtrace: x 1. +-testthat::expect_identical(...) at test-shinytest2-teal_picks_playground.R:80:3 2. | \-testthat::quasi_label(enquo(object), label) 3. | \-rlang::eval_bare(expr, quo_get_env(quo)) 4. \-teal.modules.clinical:::get_teal_picks_slot(app, "paramcd", "datasets") 5. \-app_driver$wait_for_js(...) at ./helper-TealAppDriver.R:193:3 6. \-shinytest2:::app_wait_for_js(...) 7. \-shinytest2:::chromote_wait_for_condition(self$get_chromote_session(), script, timeout = timeout, interval = interval) 8. \-rlang::abort(...)

skipped.message: Reason: Slow CI machine prevents this test from succeding ('test-shinytest2-tm_t_pp_laboratory.R:1:1')

testcase.name: e2e_tm_t_shift_by_grade_Starts_with_specified_label_arm_var_paramcd_worst_flag_var_anl_toxgrade_var_base_toxgrade_var_worst_flag_indicator_add_total_drop_arm_levels_code_missing_baseline.

failure.message: Expected `app_driver$get_text("#teal-teal_modules-active_tab .active > a")` to equal "Grade Laboratory Abnormality Table". ('test-shinytest2-tm_t_shift_by_grade.R:64:5')

testcase.failure: Expected `app_driver$get_text("#teal-teal_modules-active_tab .active > a")` to equal "Grade Laboratory Abnormality Table". Differences: `actual` is NULL `expected` is a character vector ('Grade Laboratory Abnormality Table')

testcase.name: e2e_tm_t_shift_by_grade_Starts_with_specified_label_arm_var_paramcd_worst_flag_var_anl_toxgrade_var_base_toxgrade_var_worst_flag_indicator_add_total_drop_arm_levels_code_missing_baseline.

error.message: Error in `chromote_wait_for_condition(self$get_chromote_session(), script, timeout = timeout, interval = interval)`: Timed out waiting for JavaScript script to return `true` ('test-shinytest2-tm_t_shift_by_grade.R:80:5')

testcase.error: Error in `chromote_wait_for_condition(self$get_chromote_session(), script, timeout = timeout, interval = interval)`: Timed out waiting for JavaScript script to return `true` i `timeout`: 30000 i `script`: document.getElementById("teal-teal_modules-nav-grade_laboratory_abnormality_table-module-anl_toxgrade_var-variables-selected") !== null Backtrace: x 1. +-testthat::expect_equal(...) at test-shinytest2-tm_t_shift_by_grade.R:80:5 2. | \-testthat::quasi_label(enquo(object), label) 3. | \-rlang::eval_bare(expr, quo_get_env(quo)) 4. \-teal.modules.clinical:::get_teal_picks_slot(...) 5. \-app_driver$wait_for_js(...) at ./helper-TealAppDriver.R:193:3 6. \-shinytest2:::app_wait_for_js(...) 7. \-shinytest2:::chromote_wait_for_condition(self$get_chromote_session(), script, timeout = timeout, interval = interval) 8. \-rlang::abort(...)

testcase.name: e2e_tm_t_shift_by_grade_Deselection_of_worst_flag_throws_validation_error.
testcase.failure:
Expected `is.null(self$get_html(".shiny-output-error-validation"))` to be FALSE. Differences: `actual`: TRUE `expected`: FALSE
Validation error is not observed Backtrace: x 1. \-app_driver$expect_validation_error() at test-shinytest2-tm_t_shift_by_grade.R:167:3 2. \-testthat::expect_false(...)

testcase.name: e2e_tm_t_shift_by_grade_Invalid_worst_flag_indicator_shows_validation_error_instead_of_hanging

error.message: Error in `app_initialize(self, private, app_dir = app_dir, ..., load_timeout = load_timeout, timeout = timeout, wait = wait, expect_values_screenshot_args = expect_values_screenshot_args, screenshot_args = screenshot_args, check_names = check_names, name = name, variant = variant, view = view, height = height, width = width, seed = seed, clean_logs = clean_logs, shiny_args = shiny_args, render_args = render_args, options = options)`: Shiny app did not become stable in 60000ms. ('test-shinytest2-tm_t_shift_by_grade.R:211:5')

testcase.error:
Error in `app_initialize(self, private, app_dir = app_dir, ..., load_timeout = load_timeout, timeout = timeout, wait = wait, expect_values_screenshot_args = expect_values_screenshot_args, screenshot_args = screenshot_args, check_names = check_names, name = name, variant = variant, view = view, height = height, width = width, seed = seed, clean_logs = clean_logs, shiny_args = shiny_args, render_args = render_args, options = options)`: Shiny app did not become stable in 60000ms. Message: An error occurred while waiting for Shiny to be stable Caused by error in `app_wait_for_idle()`: ! An error occurred while waiting for Shiny to be stable
i You can inspect the failed AppDriver object via `rlang::last_error()$app` i AppDriver logs: {shinytest2} R info 21:09:14.45 Start AppDriver initialization {shinytest2} R info 21:09:14.58 Starting Shiny app {shinytest2} R info 21:09:17.05 Creating new ChromoteSession {shinytest2} R info 21:09:17.11 Navigating to Shiny app {shinytest2} R info 21:09:18.48 Injecting shiny-tracer.js {chromote} JS info 21:09:18.51 shinytest2; jQuery not found {chromote} JS info 21:09:18.51 shinytest2; Loaded {shinytest2} R info 21:09:18.51 Waiting for Shiny to become ready {chromote} JS info 21:09:18.57 shinytest2; jQuery found {chromote} JS info 21:09:18.57 shinytest2; Waiting for shiny session to connect {chromote} JS info 21:09:19.24 shinytest2; Connected {chromote} JS info 21:09:19.24 shinytest2; shiny:busy {chromote} JS log 21:09:19.24 Teal: Sending document title: teal app to input: teal-teal_modules-app_title (anonymous) @ :607:10 _sendMessagesToHandlers @ shiny-javascript-1.13.0/shiny.min.js:443:9132 (anonymous) @ shiny-javascript-1.13.0/shiny.min.js:443:10821 _sendMessagesToHandlers @ shiny-javascript-1.13.0/shiny.min.js:443:9132 dispatchMessage @ shiny-javascript-1.13.0/shiny.min.js:443:8967 (anonymous) @ shiny-javascript-1.13.0/shiny.min.js:443:4894 startActionQueueLoop @ shiny-javascript-1.13.0/shiny.min.js:443:5180 {shinytest2} R info 21:09:19.24 Waiting for Shiny to become idle for 200ms within 60000ms {chromote} JS info 21:09:19.25 shinytest2; Waiting for Shiny to be stable {shinytest2} R info 21:10:19.26 Error while initializing AppDriver: Shiny app did not become stable in 60000ms. Message: An error occurred while waiting for Shiny to be stable Caused by error in `app_wait_for_idle()`: ! An error occurred while waiting for Shiny to be stable {shiny} R stderr ----------- Loading required package: shiny {shiny} R stderr ----------- Attempting to load the environment ‘package:forcats’ {shiny} R stderr ----------- Loading required package: teal.data {shiny} R stderr ----------- Loading required package: teal.code {shiny} R stderr ----------- Loading required package: teal.slice {shiny} R stderr ----------- {shiny} R stderr ----------- You are using teal version 1.1.0.9031 {shiny} R stderr ----------- {shiny} R stderr ----------- Attaching package: ‘teal’ {shiny} R stderr ----------- {shiny} R stderr ----------- The following objects are masked from ‘package:teal.slice’: {shiny} R stderr ----------- {shiny} R stderr ----------- as.teal_slices, teal_slices {shiny} R stderr ----------- {shiny} R stderr ----------- Running application in test mode. {shiny} R stderr ----------- {shiny} R stderr ----------- Listening on http://127.0.0.1:6434
Caused by error in `app_initialize_()`: ! Shiny app did not become stable in 60000ms. Message: An error occurred while waiting for Shiny to be stable Caused by error in `app_wait_for_idle()`: ! An error occurred while waiting for Shiny to be stable Backtrace: x 1. +-teal.modules.clinical (local) app_driver_tm_t_shift_by_grade_invalid_data() at test-shinytest2-tm_t_shift_by_grade.R:211:5 2. | \-teal.modules.clinical:::init_teal_app_driver(...) at test-shinytest2-tm_t_shift_by_grade.R:180:3 3. | +-testthat::with_mocked_bindings(...) at ./helper-TealAppDriver.R:26:3 4. | \-TealAppDriver$new(...) at ./helper-TealAppDriver.R:29:7 5. | \-teal (local) initialize(...) 6. | +-base::suppressWarnings(...) 7. | | \-base::withCallingHandlers(...) 8. | +-withr::with_envvar(...) 9. | | \-base::force(code) 10. | \-super$initialize(...) 11. | \-shinytest2:::app_initialize(...) 12. | +-base::withCallingHandlers(...) 13. | \-shinytest2:::app_initialize_(self, private, ..., view = view) 14. | +-base::withCallingHandlers(...) 15. | \-self$wait_for_idle(duration = 200, timeout = private$load_timeout) 16. | \-shinytest2:::app_wait_for_idle(...) 17. | \-shinytest2:::app_abort(self, private, "An error occurred while waiting for Shiny to be stable") 18. | \-rlang::abort(..., app = self, call = call) 19. | \-rlang:::signal_abort(cnd, .file) 20. | \-base::signalCondition(cnd) 21. +-shinytest2 (local) `<fn>`(`<rlng_rrr>`) 22. | \-shinytest2:::app_abort(...) 23. | \-rlang::abort(..., app = self, call = call) 24. | \-rlang:::signal_abort(cnd, .file) 25. | \-base::signalCondition(cnd) 26. \-shinytest2 (local) `<fn>`(`<rlng_rrr>`) 27. \-shinytest2:::app_abort(...) 28. \-rlang::abort(..., app = self, call = call)
